sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_time (id, event_time) VALUES (1, sys.epoch(1234567890.456));
UPDATE test_time SET event_time = sys.epoch(9876543210.789) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, event_time + INTERVAL '1 hour' AS new_time FROM test_time;
SELECT event_time, event_time - INTERVAL '5 seconds' AS adjusted_time FROM test_time;
